results.validation_notes: Previous classification was 'Indeterminate' at 0.75 confidence. Deep context reveals clear architectural patterns: (1) Pipe-and-Filter is fundamental - Nextflow IS a workflow pipeline engine where data flows through processes; (2) Modular Monolith - single Gradle build with modules/ subdirectory structure; (3) Event-Driven - channels use pub/sub patterns, built on GPars reactive framework. The 45 signals detected in automated discovery included package manifests (18), messaging (3), and ADRs (4) which corroborate this multi-style classification.
